description: A generic two-column split layout used for pairing different content types side by side: image + text, video + text, or text + text. Supports 50/50 and asymmetrical splits.

FR-01.title: Two-Column Structure
FR-01.description: The block MUST render two distinct content columns side by side on desktop.
acceptance: Left and right columns each contain independent content
Columns are equal width (50/50) or asymmetrical (40/60, 30/70)

FR-02.title: Content Flexibility
FR-02.description: Each column MUST support various content types.
acceptance: Left column may contain: image, video, or text
Right column may contain: heading, paragraphs, CTA, or another content block
Content can be reversed (text left, media right)

FR-03.title: Image/Media Column
FR-03.description: When a column contains an image or video, it MUST render responsively.
acceptance: Image: object-fit cover, fills column width
Video: poster overlay with play button (inherits B05 behavior)

FR-04.title: Text Column
FR-04.description: When a column contains text, it MUST support heading, paragraphs, and CTA.

FR-05.title: Responsive Stacking
FR-05.description: Columns MUST stack vertically on mobile.

accessibility.AC-01: Reading order MUST be logical when columns stack
accessibility.AC-02: Images MUST have meaningful alt text
accessibility.AC-03: Content in both columns MUST be accessible via keyboard
